top_signals.title: Russia strikes Ukraine capital with missiles and drones, wounds five
top_signals.summary: The attack came after the Ukrainian air force warned missiles were headed toward the capital and followed Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy cutting short a visit to Dublin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB publishes indicative operational calendars for 2028
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: ECB publishes indicative operational calendars for 2027
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/06 - Form PL - updates to definitions
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Global Appetite for Korea Grows Ahead of 24-Hour Won Trading
top_signals.summary: Global investors’ interest in South Korea’s economy and capital markets has “clearly changed” for the better in recent years, the country’s top finance ministry official said, as the won prepares to shift to round-the-clock trading on July 6.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Agencies release list of distressed or underserved nonmetropolitan middle-income geographies
top_signals.summary: Agencies release list of distressed or underserved nonmetropolitan middle-income geographies

top_signals.title: Ark Invest scoops up $18 million in Circle shares as stock dips 41% over past month
top_signals.summary: Circle dropped 1% today after falling nearly 18% on Tuesday following the launch of the rival stablecoin project OUSD.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: UK’s Starmer unveils $20 billion defense boost in long-delayed investment plan
top_signals.summary: The Defence Investment Plan falls short of the £28 billion($37 billion) wanted by defense chiefs and represents a 5% increase in annual defense spending.

top_signals.title: Episode 95: Coral Eclipse Day at Sandown and Newmarket
top_signals.summary: Tom Marriott and Bill Esdaile are here to preview Coral Eclipse Day at Sandown, as well as the rescheduled Old Newton Cup and Lancashire Oaks at Newmarket on Saturday. Bill also discussed his King Of Stars who rounded off a brilliant career with a win at Salisbury on Tuesday, happy retirement! The Punter ‘The Punter’ [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Thailand gets serious about chasing high-spending tourists
top_signals.summary: Officials are aiming for visitors to spend about $2,400 per trip on average, compared with roughly $1,500 currently.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Teen suspect in Scattered Spider hacks is extradited to US
top_signals.summary: A complaint unsealed this week accuses a 19-year-old of participating in incidents including a breach of a "luxury-jewelry retailer" in 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
